sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96314" key="stafulhtomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στᾰφῠλη-τομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n96314.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">excision of the uvula</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:185" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.185</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
